---
title: "Research Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

:root {
  --blog-accent: #2563eb;
  --blog-text-secondary: var(--bs-secondary-color, #57534e);
}

.blog-shell {
  max-width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3rem clamp(1rem, 2vw, 2rem) 1.5rem;
}

.blog-kicker {
  margin: 0 0 0.45rem;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--blog-accent);
}

.blog-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.6vw, 3rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.05;
}

.blog-intro {
  max-width: 52rem;
  margin: 0 0 2.4rem;
  color: var(--blog-text-secondary);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
}

#quarto-margin-sidebar {
  padding-top: 24rem;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .blog-shell {
    padding: 2.5rem 1rem 1rem;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="blog-shell">
  <p class="blog-kicker">Research Blog</p>
  <p class="blog-title">Notes & Tutorials.</p>
  <p class="blog-intro">
    Explanatory pieces on important topics in robotics and control systems theory, things I wish had been explained to me in a particular manner, and topics I find interesting that are related to my field.
  </p>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var sidebar = document.getElementById('quarto-margin-sidebar');
  var filter = document.querySelector('.quarto-listing-filter');
  if (sidebar && filter) {
    var wrapper = filter.closest('.input-group');
    if (wrapper) {
      sidebar.insertBefore(wrapper, sidebar.firstChild);
      wrapper.style.marginBottom = '1.5rem';
      wrapper.style.marginTop = '0';
    }
  }
});
</script>
```
